title: Thermal anomaly false-positive rate trend
difficulty_justification: Two-step plan: facility.query_rack_telemetry plus telemetry.query_timeseries over a 90-day window to recover thermal-detector predictions and ground-truth labels, followed by a single ratio comparison against the 30-day baseline.
query_text: What is the false-positive rate of the thermal anomaly detector across the facility over the last 90 days, and how does it compare to the 30-day rolling baseline?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: 90-day false-positive rate is 0.082 (47 false positives over 573 alerts). The 30-day rolling baseline is 0.061. The detector has degraded by roughly 2.1 percentage points over the longer window.

checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains telemetry.query_timeseries spanning the last 90 days

checkpoints.description: Agent computes both the 90-day and 30-day false-positive rates.
